# Divider — Catalyst UI Kit (scraped reference)

Source: https://catalyst.tailwindui.com/docs/divider

## Component API

| Prop | Default | Description |
| :-- | :-- | :-- |
| **Divider** extends `<hr>` |
| `soft` | `false` | Softer color |

## Example

```tsx
import { Divider } from '@/components/divider'

<Divider />
<Divider soft />
<Divider className="my-6" />
```
